query: 单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：

decision.archive_summary: Earlier block covered whether the assistant can self-test and the requirement to expose context size visibly and continuously in VS Code without manual commands, ideally via status bar/editor/terminal-style auto-refresh. A later sub-issue clarified that Project Assistant should not be touched; the user wants a separate implementation with clear boundaries. The assistant then stated it had created a standalone VS Code extension and reverted the Project Assistant integration.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic at the end is still the same implementation thread, now narrowed to the boundary requirement around a standalone extension, so relation=continue. The next turn is most likely to depend on the recent boundary discussion and the assistant's claim that it was separated, not on the earlier raw back-and-forth about self-testing or command-based viewing. Older solved/status turns are good eviction candidates. The semantic requirements worth preserving as pins are the durable product constraint from t5 (automatic visible context display, no manual refresh/commands) and the explicit boundary rule from t11 (do it separately, do not touch Project Assistant).
